puzzle.hint: This verse affirms God's absolute sovereignty as both the sole Creator and the ultimate Guardian over all of creation.
puzzle.arabic: ٱللَّهُ خَـٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَكِيلٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: Allāh is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs.
